title: Just Herbs is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Just Herbs is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
